channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "Anachronistic Dream": Kim Jong Un's Sister To US On Denuclearisation Call

media:content.media:description: North Korea has been focusing on enlarging its nuclear arsenal.

item.description: The statement came a day before Chinese President Xi Jinping visits North Korea for talks with Kim Jong Un, in his first visit to the country in seven years.
item.content:encoded: The statement came a day before Chinese President Xi Jinping visits North Korea for talks with Kim Jong Un, in his first visit to the country in seven years.

item.title: London Entrepreneur Stabbed To Death After Money Dispute, Killer Jailed For Life

media:content.media:description: The jury found Abdulkareem guilty of murder, leading to a life sentence with a minimum term of 17 years.

item.description: Prosecutors said a disagreement over finances escalated into violence, with Abdulkareem stabbing Manuel three times using a kitchen knife.
item.content:encoded: Prosecutors said a disagreement over finances escalated into violence, with Abdulkareem stabbing Manuel three times using a kitchen knife.

item.title: 1 Dead, 5 Injured In Multiple Shooting Attacks In Israel-Occupied West Bank

media:content.media:description: Police identified the attacker as a Palestinian citizen of Israel.

item.description: Israel's police said they had killed one attacker. Large cohorts of Israeli soldiers carried out searches in the area, on the ground and by air, for additional assailants.
item.content:encoded: Israel's police said they had killed one attacker. Large cohorts of Israeli soldiers carried out searches in the area, on the ground and by air, for additional assailants.

item.title: German Man Sets World Record For Eating Over 1 Kg Of Honey In One Minute

media:content.media:description: His accomplishment highlights his experience and ability in competitive eating events.

item.description: Andre Ortolf is widely known for his achievements in speed eating and speed drinking events.
item.content:encoded: Andre Ortolf is widely known for his achievements in speed eating and speed drinking events.

item.title: Excessive AI Use Is Like 'Porn Addiction': Palantir CEO Slams 'Tokenmaxxing'
item.description: Alex Karp argued that organisations have prioritised increasing token consumption over assessing the tangible value delivered
item.content:encoded: Alex Karp argued that organisations have prioritised increasing token consumption over assessing the tangible value delivered

item.title: US Iran War Live Updates: US Shoots Down 2 Iranian Drones, Pak Minister Visits Tehran
item.description: US Iran War Live Updates:United States military officials said Iran launched seven ballistic missiles toward neighboring Gulf nations of Kuwait and Bahrain.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates:United States military officials said Iran launched seven ballistic missiles toward neighboring Gulf nations of Kuwait and Bahrain.

item.title: Nepal Seeks "Open-Heart" Talks With India To Resolve Border Dispute

media:content.media:description: Shishir Khanal kicked off a three-day trip to New Delhi on Friday

item.description: Shishir Khanal said the new government in Kathmandu refuses to look at India through the "distorted, hyper-sensitive lens of 21st century geopolitics"
item.content:encoded: Shishir Khanal said the new government in Kathmandu refuses to look at India through the "distorted, hyper-sensitive lens of 21st century geopolitics"

item.title: Israel Spying On Trump's Iran Negotiators? US Intelligence Raises Concerns

media:content.media:description: US and Israel have long been aware that both countries collect intelligence on each other

item.description: Intelligence reports have suggested that Israeli spy agencies may have intensified surveillance activities aimed at understanding the US negotiating position in talks with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Intelligence reports have suggested that Israeli spy agencies may have intensified surveillance activities aimed at understanding the US negotiating position in talks with Iran.

item.title: Senior Royals Gather As King Charles' Nephew Marries Nurse Harriet Sperling

media:content.media:description: King Charles at his nephew Peter Phillips' wedding.

item.description: Phillips, the son of Charles' sister Princess Anne, wed Harriet Sperling, a nurse working for the National Health Service, in a church ceremony.
item.content:encoded: Phillips, the son of Charles' sister Princess Anne, wed Harriet Sperling, a nurse working for the National Health Service, in a church ceremony.

item.title: 'Strong, Proud, But Got No Choice': Trump On Iran Playing Tough On Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: The Middle East region has been on the edge as US struck Iranian targets and Tehran retaliated.

item.description: Trump admitted that Iran has the capacity left to continue fighting the war, contradicting his claims that the US military has crippled Tehran's defenses.
item.content:encoded: Trump admitted that Iran has the capacity left to continue fighting the war, contradicting his claims that the US military has crippled Tehran's defenses.

item.title: US Eyes Iranian Assets For Gulf Allies' Reconstruction: Report

media:content.media:description: The source did not specify what kind of assets the Treasury was examining.

item.description: The U.S. government will attempt to redirect Iranian assets to Gulf states for rebuilding and repairs of future
item.content:encoded: The U.S. government will attempt to redirect Iranian assets to Gulf states for rebuilding and repairs of future

item.title: Indian Man Delivering 'Fake' Pizza Order Shot Dead In US, Family Says "Trap"

media:content.media:description: Anshul's sister, Tanvi, alleged that the pizza delivery was a "trap" meant to "kill him".

item.description: The victim, identified as Anshul Kuncha, was employed with a multinational company and used to work part-time as a pizza delivery executive on weekends to earn extra income.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1109855/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The victim, identified as Anshul Kuncha, was employed with a multinational company and used to work part-time as a pizza delivery executive on weekends to earn extra income.

item.title: 'Donald, Donald Trump': Trump Posts AI Music Video Praising Himself

media:content.media:description: The minute-long song centers almost entirely on Trump's global appeal.

item.description: The minute-long song centres almost entirely on Trump's global appeal, with lyrics repeatedly asserting that people from countries across different continents admire him.
item.content:encoded: The minute-long song centres almost entirely on Trump's global appeal, with lyrics repeatedly asserting that people from countries across different continents admire him.

item.title: Missing US Student Found Dead Near Japan's Kyoto

media:content.media:description: An initial search by Japanese authorities lasted three days but found no traces of him.

item.description: An American student who disappeared while on a family vacation in Japan was found dead outside Kyoto, his mother wrote in a Facebook post on Saturday. • The
item.content:encoded: An American student who disappeared while on a family vacation in Japan was found dead outside Kyoto, his mother wrote in a Facebook post on Saturday. • The

item.title: Trump Says His Team Will 'Look Into' US Taking Stake In AI Companies

media:content.media:description: The Trump administration has been struggling to decide how tightly to regulate AI.

item.description: Senior US officials held preliminary discussions with AI companies about the potential for the government to buy some shares in their firms, per a report.
item.content:encoded: Senior US officials held preliminary discussions with AI companies about the potential for the government to buy some shares in their firms, per a report.

item.title: 'It Was A Gorgeous, Big Gift': Joe Biden's Wife Recalls Diamond Given By PM Modi

media:content.media:description: Among the gifts she recalls most vividly was a 7.5-carat synthetic diamond presented by PM Modi

item.description: In her memoir View from the East Wing: A Memoir, Biden offers a behind-the-scenes account of life at the White House and the strict rules governing gifts received by America's First Family
item.content:encoded: In her memoir View from the East Wing: A Memoir, Biden offers a behind-the-scenes account of life at the White House and the strict rules governing gifts received by America's First Family

item.title: North Korea Nuclear Programme 'Absolutely Non-negotiable': Kim Jong Un's Sister

media:content.media:description: Kim Yo Jong is a key player in the country's communications and foreign policy.

item.description: North Korea's nuclear weapons programme is "absolutely non-negotiable", the powerful sister of leader Kim Jong Un said in a statement carried by state media on Sunday, ahead of a...
item.content:encoded: North Korea's nuclear weapons programme is "absolutely non-negotiable", the powerful sister of leader Kim Jong Un said in a statement carried by state media on Sunday, ahead of a...

item.title: At Least 12 People Shot At US Community Festival, Search For Suspects Underway

media:content.media:description: An active search was underway for those responsible. (Representational)

item.description: The Toledo Police Department said the shooting happened near the Old West End Festival, an annual gathering of live music and home tours in a historic district of the city.
item.content:encoded: The Toledo Police Department said the shooting happened near the Old West End Festival, an annual gathering of live music and home tours in a historic district of the city.

item.title: Indian-American Sriram Krishnan Quits As White House AI Adviser After 18 Months

media:content.media:description: Sriram Krishnan described his government service as "the privilege of a lifetime"

item.description: In a statement posted on social media, Sriram Krishnan said he would take a break before returning to work on major AI-related challenges facing the United States.
item.content:encoded: In a statement posted on social media, Sriram Krishnan said he would take a break before returning to work on major AI-related challenges facing the United States.

item.title: "We Give Highest Priority To Our Ties": Nepal Calls India "Most Important Partner"

media:content.media:description: The two ministers vowed to take the bilateral ties to "new heights"

item.description: Nepal's Foreign Minister Shishir Khanal kicked off a three-day trip to New Delhi on Friday to strengthen bilateral ties
item.content:encoded: Nepal's Foreign Minister Shishir Khanal kicked off a three-day trip to New Delhi on Friday to strengthen bilateral ties
